VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and appears on arXiv (2201.11903), ACM DL, DBLP, and OpenReview with the exact title and substantially matching authors. The only discrepancy is a minor author-name formatting difference: the cited reference lists "Brian Ichter" (present in the arXiv/Portkey listing but absent from the automated checker's "correct" list) and uses "Ed Chi" and "Fei Xia" instead of "Ed H. Chi" and "F. Xia" — these are trivial formatting variants, not fabricated authors.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.11903
